---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG / PROBLEM] Describe the issue briefly"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Enter '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen instead?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS, Windows]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.9, 3.10]
- Branch: [e.g. master, develop]

## Acceptance Criteria
This bug is fixed when:
- [ ] The issue can no longer be reproduced with the provided steps
- [ ] The expected behavior works consistently
- [ ] No regression in related functionality
- [ ] Fix has been tested manually with edge cases
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines

## Additional Context
Add any other relevant information here.
